title: EB has update, CC on the latest - Earbuds can be updated and popup for Charge Chase will NOT be displayed
scenario: After updating earbuds to latest version while charge case is already up-to-date, the charge case popup card should not appear on the Device Home Screen.
steps: Ensure the Earbuds (EB) have an update available.
Ensure the Charge Case (CC) is on the latest version.
Return to the Device Home Screen.
expected: The Charge Case popup card should NOT be displayed.
